Speaker: SPEAKER_01
Text: Thirdly, acts are despicable and have no place in American society.

Speaker: SPEAKER_01
Text: I want to assure you we've deployed the full resources of the FBI, the United States

Speaker: SPEAKER_01
Text: Secret Service, and they're working very closely with law enforcement officials.

Speaker: SPEAKER_01
Text: We'll continue to monitor these investigations, and those responsible will be brought to justice.
